about.title: About KaarYab Afghanistan
about.subtitle: Connecting Afghan youth to opportunities worldwide
about.heroSubtitle: Connecting students, graduates, and young professionals to trusted opportunities for learning, work, and growth.
about.heroDescription: Empowering Afghan youth with access to education, remote work, and growth opportunities worldwide.
about.missionText: KaarYab Afghanistan is dedicated to helping Afghan students, graduates, and young professionals find meaningful opportunities for growth and development. We believe that everyone deserves access to quality education, remote work, and professional growth programs regardless of their location.
about.whatWeDoScholarships: Scholarships: Connecting students to educational opportunities
about.whatWeDoRemote: Remote Jobs: Helping professionals find flexible work
about.whatWeDoTraining: Training: Building skills for the future
about.teamText: We are a small group of passionate volunteers who believe in the power of education and technology to change lives.
about.valuesIntro: Everything we build is shaped by trust, accessibility, growth, and practical innovation for Afghan communities.
about.trustDesc: All opportunities are carefully reviewed and verified for authenticity and quality.
about.accessDesc: Everything on KaarYab is completely free — no hidden fees, no premium subscriptions.
about.growthDesc: Helping you build skills and advance your career through meaningful opportunities.
about.innovationDesc: We are a small group of passionate volunteers who believe in the power of education and technology to change lives.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to explore or share an opportunity?
about.ctaText: Browse verified listings or contribute a new opportunity to support Afghan youth and professionals.
